widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values:
输入中文或英文描述都可以。根据参考图片保持主体身份、服装、脸部特征和画面风格；根据输入音频生成同长度的视频，让主体自然说话或唱歌，嘴型、表情、头部和手部动作与音频节奏同步。镜头必须稳定，固定构图，面部和上半身清晰可见；不要推拉摇移或突然变焦。手部根据语音节奏自然做小幅摆动、强调性手势或轻微抬手动作，动作要连贯、克制、符合说话语气，不要遮挡嘴部和脸部。避免画面闪烁、身份漂移、额外人物、文字水印、畸形手指、手部乱动和口型不同步。

English fallback: Use the reference image as the first frame and preserve the subject identity, face, clothing, and visual style. Generate an audio-driven video with the same duration as the input audio. The subject speaks or sings naturally with accurate lip sync, facial expressions, subtle head movement, and natural hand gestures matching the rhythm and emotion of the speech. Keep the camera locked-off and stable, with a fixed composition and no zooms, pans, shakes, or sudden reframing. The hands may gently sway, rise slightly, or make restrained emphasis gestures in sync with the voice, but they must not cover the mouth or face. Natural motion, no flicker, no identity drift, no extra people, no text or watermark, no deformed fingers, no chaotic hand motion.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles

nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
- Huggingface: [Lightricks/LTX-2.3](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/)
- Github: [LTX-2](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2)

## Shezw LTX-2.3 Image + Audio to Video

用途：输入一张图片和一段音频，使用 LTX-2.3 生成音频驱动视频。Prompt 可写中文或英文，`TextGenerateLTX2Prompt` 会结合图片与文本生成适合 LTX-2.3 的英文视频提示。

使用：
1. 把图片放入 ComfyUI/input，LoadImage 选择图片。
2. 把音频放入 ComfyUI/input，LoadAudio 选择音频。
3. Duration 填入音频总秒数，audio_start 保持 0。当前 ComfyUI 官方模板没有内置 AudioDuration 输出节点，所以纯原生节点不能从 LoadAudio 自动取秒数；这里保留官方 LTX-2.3 结构，用 Duration 控制视频帧数并用 TrimAudioDuration 对齐音频。
4. 生成结果保存前缀：video/cfy-shezw-ltx23-audio-image-video。

建议：24 fps，1280x720；竖屏可改 720x1280。长音频建议分段生成后剪辑拼接，显存压力会更稳。

## Required Models

checkpoints/ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors
loras/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors
loras/gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors
latent_upscale_models/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors
text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors

## Auto Duration Variant

This file connects AudioDuration.seconds to LTX-2.3 Duration. It requires the zhihui_nodes_comfyui AudioDuration custom node. If that node is missing, install the AudioDuration node or manually set Duration in a copied workflow.
